targets.rawSql: SELECT state, COUNT(*) as count FROM bgp_sessions WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' GROUP BY state
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT peer_ip) as count FROM bgp_sessions WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM bgp_sessions WHERE state = 'established' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM bgp_sessions WHERE state != 'established' AND time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'
SELECT time, device_hostname, peer_ip, CASE WHEN state = 'established' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as is_up FROM bgp_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT time, device_hostname || ' - ' || peer_ip as peer, in_updates FROM bgp_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT time, device_hostname || ' - ' || peer_ip as peer, out_updates FROM bgp_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT time, device_hostname || ' - ' || peer_ip as peer, in_total_messages FROM bgp_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time
SELECT time, device_hostname || ' - ' || peer_ip as peer, out_total_messages FROM bgp_sessions WHERE $__timeFilter(time) ORDER BY time

SELECT device_hostname, peer_ip, peer_as, state, uptime_seconds/3600 as uptime_hours, fsm_established_transitions as flaps, in_updates, out_updates FROM bgp_sessions WHERE time > NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ORDER BY device_hostname, peer_ip
